title: Welcome to Cloud Notes ☁️
body:
This is your personal cloud-powered notes app. Here's what you can do:

• Create notes with rich text and tags
• Search and filter your notes instantly
• Edit or delete notes at any time
• Everything is stored and ready for the cloud

Built with Next.js, styled with a premium dark UI, and deployed via Docker + Azure + Terraform.

title: DevOps Architecture 🚀
body:
This project demonstrates a complete DevOps pipeline:

1. Next.js 14 frontend with TypeScript
2. Multi-stage Docker build (node:18-alpine)
3. Azure Container Registry (ACR) for image storage
4. Azure Container Instances for hosting
5. Terraform for full infrastructure-as-code
6. CI/CD ready with environment vars

Run `terraform apply` to spin up the entire stack in minutes.

title: Ideas & Roadmap 🧠
body:
Features to add next:

- [ ] User authentication with NextAuth.js
- [ ] PostgreSQL via Prisma (schema is ready!)
- [ ] Real-time sync with WebSockets
- [ ] Markdown rendering in notes
- [ ] Note sharing / public links
- [ ] Mobile app with React Native
- [ ] Export to PDF / Notion
- [ ] Let's Goooo!
